payload.label: dining table
payload.long_description: Close-up of a light-brown, wood-grain dining tabletop (likely laminate or veneered) with a straight/beveled edge; surface shows mottled grain texture and light wear or staining, cropped at the left and partially covered by crumpled paper/packaging on the right; camera roughly 0.6 m above the surface.
